name: Philosophy
note: A grade of C (2.0) or higher must be earned in all courses counted toward a major in philosophy. The recommended beginning course is PHL-105 Introduction to Philosophy, but any 100-level course is suitable.

sections.label: Two History of Philosophy Courses
sections.description: Two of the following, one of which must be either PHL-240 Early Modern Philosophy or PHL-335 Late Modern Philosophy.

sections.label: Five Additional Philosophy Courses
sections.description: Five additional philosophy courses, at least two of which must be numbered 200 or above.
